caption: A person with blonde hair wearing a dark blue shirt and headphones is visible in a small picture-in-picture window on the left side of a football video game interface. The main screen displays a play-calling menu set against a blurred stadium background. On-screen text includes "SELECT A PLAY" and "PREVIOUS PLAY," along with game status indicators like "3rd & 6" and a game clock showing "2:33." Various play options are shown in the center, such as "PA DEEP CROSS" and "HB STRETCH," accompanied by diagrammed route paths. A small notification box reads "SAVE RANNO Plays the a blister job holding onto the ball." As the sequence progresses, the highlighted play in the menu changes from "PA DEEP CROSS" to "HB STRETCH," and eventually shifts to a screen showing "HI LO DIG" and "FOUR VERTICALS" with "MESH SPOT" and "HB ISO" also visible.
